/directive.txt.content:
SPECIAL ORDER 937
----------------
NOSTROMO REROUTED TO LV-426.
INVESTIGATE TRANSMISSION OF UNKNOWN ORIGIN.
ALLOW CREW TO INVESTIGATE.
RETURN ORGANISM FOR ANALYSIS.

ALL OTHER PRIORITIES RESCINDED.
CREW EXPENDABLE.

STARDATE 122/2087.
Receiving transmission from LV-426.
Descent ordered. Lambert thinks it's not a distress call.
I agree.

... organism ... attached to my face ...

/logs/ash.log.content:
ASH PERSONAL LOG // [recovered]

They still don't understand what I am.
The organism is the perfect creature. Hostility wrapped in beauty.
I admire it.
I have my orders. Order 937. The crew are unnecessary.
